product_results.title: JETech Magnetic Slim Case for iPhone 16 Pro 6.3-Inch Compatible with MagSafe, Full Camera Lens Protection, Ultra-Thin Lightweight Matte Finish Minimalist Phone Cover (Natural Titanium)

summary.text: This cellular phone case receives positive feedback for its quality, with customers describing it as a good case. The slim design stands out as particularly appealing, with users noting it as the thinnest case and super fine and practical. The appearance also garners praise, with customers finding it very beautiful and appreciating the beautiful finish. The fit works well for users, as it fits like a glove and slips easily into a bag. Customers also appreciate the magnetic attachment feature. However, opinions are mixed regarding the grip and durability aspects of the case.

authors_reviews.title: Good looking case
authors_reviews.text: Great case. Super thin and sleek. My only issue is that it’s a little smooth
authors_reviews.author: chris lawrence

authors_reviews.title: Thin, fits like a glove. Magsafe friendly!
authors_reviews.text: Needed a case that was magsafe friendly and thin. This did not disappointment. As another reviewer said, it is like holding the phone without a case. Magsafe charger and wallet sticks on very well to it (versus my previous case that was thicker and magsafe accessories would just slide off it), this one is much more secure.
authors_reviews.author: Nolan

authors_reviews.title: Light and thin case
authors_reviews.text: Thin as it should beMaterial feels a little cheap, but I knew that from the price pointWould recommend
authors_reviews.author: Caroline B.

authors_reviews.title: Great fit, super slim and flawless !
authors_reviews.author: Dimi

authors_reviews.title: Pratique, belle finition
authors_reviews.text: Très pratique sur un iPhone 16e d'avoir la possibilité de le charger facilement avec magsafe avec les aimants intégrés dans la coque. l'iPhone 16e n'en a pas.
authors_reviews.author: ERIC HOFFMANN

authors_reviews.title: Would recommend
authors_reviews.text: Super light weight and soft material, feels as thin as your phone without a case.
authors_reviews.author: Catherine

authors_reviews.title: A Relatively Thin MagSafe Case. Finish Can Be Improved.
authors_reviews.text: I love JETech's super thin and minimalistic cases and had been looking forward to a MagSafe version for the iPhone 16. It looks good but is noticeably thicker and heavier than the non MagSafe version, which I can understand. However, it's very slippery out of the box and not easy to grip. And there were a few spots around the edge that were sharp to touch and I had to file them down.
authors_reviews.author: Eli YZ
